news.t: Checking the Style Box: Fidelity's Systematic ‘Beta-Plus' Lineup
ETF Prime: New Launches Surge Past 370 in 2026
Fidelity Expands Enhanced Suite With Mid- & Small-Cap ETFs
Fidelity Investments® Builds out Active Enhanced ETF Suite With the Launch of Four Small, Mid Cap ETFs

holdings.infoBox: FSEV is an equity ETF with a total of 383 individual holdings. The top holdings are TTM Technologies stock at 1.73%, Fidelity Cash Central Fund at 1.44%, EchoStar at 1.33%, Commercial Metals Company at 1.01%, and EnerSys at 1.01%.

overview.description: The Fidelity Enhanced Small Cap Value ETF (FSEV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund is actively managed, selecting securities from the Russell 2000 Value Index. It aims for a portfolio of US small-cap companies exhibiting value characteristics. FSEV was launched on Apr 28, 2026 and is issued by Fidelity.
